WorkflowIntegration.Name: DVR CLI Bridge
WorkflowIntegration.Description: Bridges davinci-resolve-cli (`dvr`) operations that require Resolve JS API access (e.g. timeline cut/move). Polls a localhost HTTP server started by the CLI for tasks and executes them via WorkflowIntegration.GetResolve().
WorkflowIntegration.Author: davinci-resolve-cli
